profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk operates as an agri-food company in Indonesia and internationally. It operates in six segments: Animal Feed, Poultry Breeding, Commercial Farm, Poultry Processing and Consumer Products, Aquaculture, and Trading and Others. The company offers poultry services comprising poultry feed, breeding, and processing; commercial farming; broiler production; processed animal protein; animal health products, including vaccines and veterinary medicines; and farm supplies, such as pharmaceutical-based animal health products, premix, and livestock equipment supplies. It also provides aquaculture services consisting of aqua feed for fish and shrimp; fish and shrimp hatchery; and technical support services, such as research and development stations, and animal health and mobile diagnostic laboratories, as well as services for water quality, analysis of culture conditions and harvest data, water quality improvement and pond cleaning, improvement of cultivation systems, improvement feeding systems, feeding techniques and training on feed storage, and pond management standard operation procedures. In addition, the company offers beef cattle breeding, fattening, slaughterhouses, and value-added meat production; food products; and raw materials and value-added products, including beef, chicken, and seafood. Further, it is involved in cold storage; eel farming; real and industrial estate; plantation and farming; transportation; trading and franchise; colored bird breeding farms; deer breeding; agriculture; corn dryers; agritourism and permaculture; pharmaceutical wholesaling; agricultural machinery and equipment supplies; woven plastic bag; copra pelletizing; freight; and retail meat store activities. The company markets its products in Asia, Europe, and the United States. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Japfa Ltd.
